results.title: “Actor Danny Glover talks about the Alzheimer’s he suffers from: “Life goes on””
results.description: “n Washington.- American actor Danny Glover made public the Alzheimer’s disease he suffers from and shared some details about the condition and how he copes with it in an interview granted to People magazine, in which he sends a message of optimism to those who suffer from this ailment. n” “n “I still have my [...] La entrada “Actor Danny Glover talks about the Alzheimer’s he suffers from: “Life goes on”” se publicó primero en De Último Minuto English .
